description_long: This object consists of three rectangular concrete planters arranged side by side, each containing a cluster of vibrant artificial flowers. The flowers are colored blue, red, and white, with each planter featuring a single color group. The planters are filled with dark soil, from which green stems and lanceolate leaves emerge, supporting the colorful blossoms. The petals of the flowers are arranged radially, with each bloom displaying a symmetrical, daisy-like structure. The concrete planters have a smooth, matte finish and are stacked in a way that gives a modern, urban aesthetic. This arrangement is suitable for placement along sidewalks, in parks, or as decorative elements in public urban spaces.
description: Three rectangular concrete planters hold clusters of blue, red, and white daisy-like flowers with green stems and leaves. The planters have a modern, smooth finish and are filled with dark soil.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three planters side by side, each with a distinct color group of flowers: blue, red, and white.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the planters and the staggered arrangement of the flowers from front to back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the planters from the opposite side, with the flower colors reversed in order: white, red, and blue.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staggered arrangement of the flowers and the planters' rectangular structure.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, symmetrical pattern around a central disc, typical of daisy-like composite flowers. Each flower head displays a single whorl of evenly spaced, overlapping petals.
